sections.section_title: Security Controls and Processes for PCI DSS Requirements

policies.policy_description: Identifying all locations of cardholder data, taking an inventory of your IT assets and business processes for payment card processing and analyzing them for vulnerabilities that could expose cardholder data.
policies.scope: All entities that store, process or transmit cardholder data and/or sensitive authentication data
policies.objective: To identify all locations of cardholder data

policies.policy_description: This Guide provides supplemental information that does not replace or supersede PCI SSC Security Standards or their supporting documents.
policies.scope: All entities that store, process or transmit cardholder data and/or sensitive authentication data
policies.objective: To help protect your payment card transaction environment and apply the PCI DSS

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Identifying all locations of cardholder data, taking an inventory of your IT assets and business processes for payment card processing, and analyzing them for vulnerabilities that could expose cardholder data.

compliances.Description: Identifying all locations of cardholder data, taking an inventory of your IT assets and business processes for payment card processing, and analyzing them for vulnerabilities that could expose cardholder data.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Protect Cardholder Data - Protect Cardholder Data
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Identifying all locations of cardholder data, taking an inventory of your IT assets and business processes for payment card processing, and analyzing them for vulnerabilities that could expose cardholder data.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Assess Subpolicy Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Fixing identified vulnerabilities, securely removing any unnecessary cardholder data storage, and implementing secure business processes.
subpolicies.control: Securely removing any unnecessary cardholder data storage

compliances.Description: Ensure all sensitive cardholder data is removed from systems and storage to prevent unauthorized access.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Protect Cardholder Data - Protect Cardholder Data
compliances.ComplianceTitle: Securely removing any unnecessary cardholder data storage
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure all sensitive cardholder data is removed from systems and storage to prevent unauthorized access.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Securely removing any unnecessary cardholder data storage' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
